issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy paths.
The skill is tightly coupled to the AgentScope framework, limiting its applicability to other AI agent frameworks.

scenarios.name: multi-agent-dashboard
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response B does not implement any of the required components.

scenarios.name: audit-trail-claim-processing
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response B does not implement an AuditTrail or export the audit to a PDF as specified.

scenarios.name: decision-logging-debug
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies the rubric, while Response B does not use the required DecisionLogger or iterate over its decisions.
